title: summarize-submit-plan output
description:
Canonical pre-submit confirmation summary.

Slash-command Step 5 prints headline + body verbatim and asks
confirm_prompt. Byte-stable for the same input.

confirm_prompt.description: Literal 'Confirm? [y/N]' or magnitude-warning variant when total_tasks > 1000.
confirm_prompt.title: Confirm Prompt
